name: cli-dispatch
description: cli-dispatch — bir gorevi uygun isci CLI'ya delege et (cok-backend hub; mevcut backend: DeepSeek destekli Claude Code)

plugins.name: cli-dispatch
plugins.description: Bir gorevi uygun isci CLI'ya delege et — cok-backend delege hub'i. DeepSeek backend'i (claude-ds): ds-runner subagent + ds-* komutlari (setup/run/sessions/watch/status/balance) + tek-komut ds-agent + stream-json session takibi + read-only mod + global MCP izolasyonu + runtime/idle timeout + tasinabilir wrapper
